short_description: Port 2 on SW-U02 link flapping - up/down every 30-60 seconds
description: SW-U02 port 2 (Gi0/2) has flapped 47 times in the last hour. STP is reconverging each time and costing a few seconds of traffic. Typical signature of a bad patch cable, loose RJ45, or a dying NIC at the far end. Reseat or replace cable, then observe for 15 minutes.

cmdb.port_short_description: admin=up oper=up speed=1G duplex=full vlan=10 mode=access stp=forwarding
